revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ichikahano Shrine
| native_name = 市川神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ichikahano Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ichikahano Shrine'''|市川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q135038714|ltq=Q135038714|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province|ja|越後国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11636502|1=List of Shikinaisha in Echigo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 43
** P155: {{ill|Q11435419|ltq=Q11435419|qid=Q11435419|1=Ōgata Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135040470|ltq=Q135040470|qid=Q135040470|1=Ishiwino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Echigo Province|lt=Echigo Province|be|Этыго (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئێچیگۆ|cs|Provincie Ečigo|de|Provinz Echigo|en|Echigo Province|es|Provincia de Echigo|fa|ولایت اچیگو|fr|Province d'Echigo|gl|Provincia de Echigo|id|Provinsi Echigo|it|Echigo|ja|越後国|ko|에치고국|lt|Ečigo žemė|nl|Echigo (provincie)|pt|Província de Echigo|ru|Этиго (провинция)|simple|Echigo Province|sk|Ečigo (provincia)|sr|Провинција Ечиго|tr|Echigo (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Етіґо|zh_min_nan|Etigo-kok|zh_yue|越後國|zh|越後國|qid=Q666514|1=Echigo Province}}
* {{ill|Q11554451|ltq=Q11554451|qid=Q11554451|1=Nuttari District}}
